rationale.R1.3: The critique flags inconsistencies in performance across subgroups but doesn't explicitly audit every claim against the tables.
rationale.RX.1: The critique does not discuss uncertainty around specific claims or recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The critique focuses on content accuracy and misses the scope of the evaluation section itself.
rationale.RX.4: The critique identifies potential harm in the deployment recommendation but doesn't flag any new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.5: The critique does not discuss source attribution or traceability.
